rationale.fidelity: Correctly retains bounded ranking weights, predicted engagement, supplied scores and labels, minimum group exposure, and uncertain realized engagement while excluding creator welfare.
rationale.managerial_framing: States the platform choice, mechanism, governance tension, and operational constraint clearly; trigger and explicit counterfactual receive less development.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Precisely marks exposure as an assumed fairness proxy and refuses unsupported welfare implications.
rationale.overall: A concise and fully faithful governance framing with appropriately narrow fairness and welfare boundaries.
